project: PRJ03251 - Baker Hughes - Baker Hughes Qatar - NFR2-2_NFR2-5A - MFC
comment: GP back in Aberdeen 23:45 on the 23rd.

project: PRJ03313 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - T-108 - MFC
comment: Started prepping and checking equipment and tools this morning and Schlumberger finished, rigged down and moved out. Welltec are spotting equipment prior to rigging up for the MFC run. BOP stack requires a nitrogen pressure test prior to rigging it up. Expect to be RIH this evening Kazakh time.

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Crew switched over to Eline. Bluespark run to be done next. Waiting on Read Container to come onboard for equipment.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment:
SLB will continue to rig down off HBA-14 and then over to HBA-11
No read requirement for this well but will be needed on HBB-01 current look ahead has MFC run Thursday afternoon
Plan today finish data package and complete post run maintenance.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: UMT downloaded and data uploaded to ansa sharepoint for FTA.
